Excellent and affordable shopping store for solos, couples, families, friends and children. A lot of varieties at a single store. It has a nice variety of clothes of every kind for all ages of men, women and children. It has western, formal, informal, simple and designed clothes including kurti, shirts, t-shirts, cargos, jeans, gowns and tops. It also has a good variety of footwear including slippers, shoes, sneakers, sandals and platforms.

The variety of western and designed clothes are really large. The quality of clothes is also great and durable. There are less chances of shrinking and color fade too. The fitting is also nearly perfect.

The entrance and the exit are the same and attractive. The store is situated on three floors including ground, first and second. Women's Wear and Beauty are on the ground floor. Ethno Fusion, Innerwear, Women's Wear, Loungewear and Kids section are on the first floor. Men's Wear and Footwear are on the second floor. Lift and well furnished staircase are provided for the movement  between the floors. Trial rooms are provided on each floor and are well located. There are 8 trial rooms on the second floor. Billing Counters are also there on the ground and the second floor. The Return and Exchange Counter is on the first floor.

A large variety of beauty and fashion products are there including lipstick, lip gloss, kajal and perfumes. One of the biggest advantages is easy return or exchange other than efficient pricing with good discounts. If the desired size is not available, it is converted to customer credit notes and can be used later.

The timings of the store are 11 am-9 pm. The infrastructure is really good and attractive with glass boundaries and good views. The indoors are well designed, well maintained and clean by well trained staff. Free street parking is also provided. One suggestion is that the staff can be more helpful.

Overall, a wonderful experience and would love to come back again.
I highly recommend Zudio for cost efficient shopping with a good variety of clothing, footwear, fashion and beauty products for all ages of men, women and children.

Zudio in Malviya Nagar is one of the worst retail experiences I've encountered. I was 35 minutes in the line and then they denied UPI, saying cash is only acceptable. The store is plagued with extremely long queues, making even a quick visit feel like a marathon. To make matters worse, they frequently deny online payments, forcing customers to scramble for cash or use cards, which is both frustrating and inconvenient. The billing process is painfully slow, further exacerbating the problem of long wait times. It's clear that the staff is either inadequately trained or overwhelmed, resulting in a chaotic and unprofessional atmosphere. The overall shopping experience is deeply unsatisfactory, with poor customer service and inefficient operations. I would strongly advise against visiting this store unless you're prepared for a frustrating ordeal. Zudio Malviya Nagar needs to seriously improve its service if it wants to retain customers. Avoid this location if you value your time and sanity.

I am deeply saddened to share that while my overall experience was good, a very unfortunate incident occurred involving my wife. My wife is pregnant, and while she was using the washroom, she sustained a cut on her hand due to a protruding nail in the door lock. This was an incredibly painful experience for both of us.
I informed the billing counter immediately about the injury caused by the lock, and they provided a band-aid urgently. However, the nail was rusted. I am now very concerned about how to administer a tetanus injection to my pregnant wife. If any complications arise, who will be held responsible?

One issue I’ve consistently faced at this store is the attitude of the staff especially the billing personnel. Whenever I ask a question or try to clear up a confusion at the counter, I’m often met with rude or unusual responses, as if I’ve done something wrong just for asking.

It’s quite disappointing because basic politeness and professionalism should be part of the job, especially when interacting with customers. If someone doesn’t want to do this kind of work, that’s understandable — but as long as they are in the role and being paid for it, there should be a certain standard of behavior expected.

I hope the management pays attention to this and works towards improving the customer service experience. A little courtesy can go a long way.

Zudio is a great place for affordable and trendy fashion. The store offers a wide variety of clothing, footwear, and accessories that fit everyday style without putting pressure on the budget. The collection is updated frequently, so you always find something new and stylish. The layout is simple, trial rooms are decent, and billing is usually quick. Quality matches the price range well, making it perfect for casual wear and quick shopping. Overall, it’s a value-for-money fashion store that suits all age groups.

Zudio, located at Vaishali Marg, Nemi Sagar Colony, Jaipur, offers a good variety of products at decent prices. The collection is trendy and value for money, which is what attracts people.

However, the overall experience is hampered by a few serious issues. Despite having four billing counters, only one is operational, leading to unnecessarily long queues and waiting times. It's disappointing to see such poor management, especially in a store operated by the TRENT group.

Additionally, they do not accept American Express cards, which limits payment flexibility for some customers. To make matters worse, the billing receipt is printed in such poor quality that it’s nearly impossible to read — a basic aspect that shouldn’t be overlooked.

Zudio has great potential, but these operational gaps need immediate attention to provide a seamless customer experience.
After sometime Zudio will be number one brand of India in clothing sector.Here you will find latest designs in reasonable price.

I recently visited Zudio, Vaishali Nagar to check out their clothing collection, and I was extremely disappointed with my experience. The service was terrible and the staff was incredibly rude. They seemed disinterested in helping me, and when I asked them questions about the clothes, they gave me short and dismissive answers.

Furthermore, I was shocked to see that the quality of the clothes was very poor. The fabrics were cheap and flimsy, and the stitching was uneven and loose. It was not the kind of quality that I would expect from a Tata brand. I was very disappointed with my visit, and I regretted going there.

Overall, I would not recommend Zudio to anyone. The service specially was terrible and the staff was rude. It was a complete waste of my time and money, and I will never go back to Zudio again.

The staff is helpful and friendly, providing a pleasant shopping experience. While the choices may be limited, this is an excellent choice for those looking for affordable and fashionable clothing options.

I recently visited the Zudio store at GT Down Town, Jaipur, and had a great shopping experience. The store is spacious, well-organized, and houses a wide and trendy collection of apparel for men, women, and kids.

During my visit, I picked up a pair of relaxed-fit jeans along with three t-shirts, all at an incredibly affordable price during their ongoing Zudio Sale. The quality of the clothing is impressive for the price range—comfortable, stylish, and perfect for everyday wear.

What stood out most was the extensive variety and availability of sizes and designs, making it easy to find exactly what I was looking for. The staff was polite and helpful throughout the process, ensuring a smooth shopping experience.

Overall, Zudio at GT Down Town is a fantastic destination for budget-friendly fashion. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quality and style at pocket-friendly prices.

Zudio GT Down Jaipur is a popular fashion destination offering trendy and affordable clothing for men, women, and kids. Located in the heart of Jaipur.
The store's layout is spacious, and products are well-organized, making it easy to navigate and find what you're looking for. The staff is friendly and helpful, ensuring a great shopping experience.
Overall, Zudio GT Down Jaipur is a great destination for those looking for affordable and trendy clothing options.

I recently visited Zudio, I must say, it's a delightful shopping experience from start to finish. From children to adults, men to women, they offer an extensive collection of clothes that cater to everyone's tastes and preferences. Whether you're looking for trendy outfits or classic staples, Zudio has it all.

But it doesn't stop there. Zudio goes the extra mile by providing a diverse range of products beyond clothing. From slippers to perfumes, accessories to home essentials, they've got you covered. The convenience of finding everything under one roof is truly commendable.

What truly sets Zudio apart is its commitment to affordability without compromising on quality. The rates are reasonable, making it accessible to all budget ranges. Whether you're shopping for a special occasion or simply updating your wardrobe, you'll find something that suits your style and wallet at Zudio.

Overall, I highly recommend Zudio to anyone looking for a seamless shopping experience with a wide variety of products at pocket-friendly prices. It's a gem of a store that exceeds expectations and keeps customers coming back for more.

My visit to the mall today left much to be desired. The staff seemed indifferent and lacked proper training, leading to a disappointing experience. To make matters worse, the mall was ill-prepared for power outages, with no backup generator in place. This resulted in inconveniences like the lifts being out of service during electricity cuts. Overall, the lack of efficiency and preparedness greatly detracted from what could have been an enjoyable shopping trip.

Zudio offers a wide array of clothing options for men, women, and children, including casual wear, ethnic wear, and accessories. The designs are contemporary, catering to a young, fashion-conscious demographic. While the quality aligns with the price point, offering decent durability and comfort, it may not match the high-end standards of premium brands.

**Pricing:**
One of Zudio's strongest points is its affordability. The brand positions itself as a budget-friendly alternative to more expensive fashion labels, making it accessible to a broader audience. Regular promotions and discounts enhance the value proposition, appealing to bargain hunters.

**Store Experience:**
Zudio stores are well-organized and user-friendly, with a clean and modern layout that makes shopping enjoyable. The staff is generally helpful and courteous, adding to the overall positive experience. However, during peak shopping times, stores can become crowded, potentially impacting the shopping experience.

**Fashion Trends:**
Zudio stays up-to-date with current fashion trends, ensuring that customers can find the latest styles without breaking the bank. The brand's quick turnaround in updating its collections keeps the inventory fresh and relevant.

**Sustainability:**
While Zudio has not made significant strides in sustainability compared to some other global brands, it is a relatively new player in the market. As consumer awareness grows, there may be opportunities for the brand to adopt more eco-friendly practices and materials.

**Online Presence:**
Zudio's online presence is still developing, with a growing e-commerce platform that complements its physical stores. The website is easy to navigate, though the online inventory can sometimes be limited compared to in-store offerings.

Zudio is an excellent choice for those seeking fashionable clothing at affordable prices. Its extensive range, trendy designs, and budget-friendly pricing make it a popular choice among young shoppers. While there is room for improvement in areas such as sustainability and online inventory, Zudio's overall offering is impressive for its market segment.

Zudio GT Down Jaipur is a popular fashion destination offering trendy and affordable clothing for men, women, and kids. Located in the heart of Jaipur, this store provides a wide range of readymade garments, kurtas, sarees, and more.

Shopping Experience
The store's layout is spacious, and products are well-organized, making it easy to navigate and find what you're looking for. The staff is friendly and helpful, ensuring a great shopping experience. Zudio's collection is diverse, with prices starting from ₹49 to ₹999, making it an excellent choice for budget-friendly shopping ¹.

Product Quality
Customers have praised Zudio for its good quality products and trendy designs. The store offers a variety of clothing options, including kurtas, dresses, and more, catering to different tastes and preferences.

Store Details
- Address: Malviya Marg, C Scheme, Jaipur (Near GT Downtown)
- Contact: You can find the contact details on the official website or through store locator platforms like INROffers
- Opening Time: Check with the store or online platforms for the most up-to-date information

Ratings
Zudio GT Down Jaipur has received positive ratings, with customers appreciating the store's collection, pricing, and service. Some ratings include ² ³:
- 4.1/5 stars based on 388 ratings
- 4.0/5 stars based on 898 ratings

Overall, Zudio GT Down Jaipur is a great destination for those looking for affordable and trendy clothing options. With its good quality products, friendly staff, and convenient location, it's definitely worth a visit.

Yesterday28/12/2024 , we visited a Zudio store to purchase a sweater but accidentally bought a bigger size. When we returned today to exchange it, the store did not have the required size. We requested the store manager, Ajay Singh, to provide information about other store locations where the item might be available. To our surprise, he rudely refused to share any inventory details.

When we asked for a refund, his behavior turned even more aggressive as he started shouting at us. Such unprofessional and disrespectful behavior from a store manager, especially at a prime location, is unacceptable.

In the end, we were forced to take a credit note against our will, which left us deeply disappointed with the service. We expect better from a brand like Zudio.

Zudio is a trendy and fashionable store located in the shopping mall. The store offers a wide range of clothing, accessories, and footwear for men, women, and kids. The store's layout is well-designed, making it easy for customers to navigate and find what they are looking for.

The clothing at Zudio is of high quality and is available at affordable prices. They have a variety of styles to choose from, ranging from casual wear to formal wear. The store also has a great selection of accessories, including bags, hats, and jewelry.

The staff at Zudio is friendly and helpful, always ready to assist customers with any queries they may have. The store is always well-stocked, and the staff ensures that the shelves are organized and neat.

One of the best things about Zudio is that they frequently update their collection, ensuring that customers have access to the latest fashion trends. The store also offers regular discounts and promotions, making it an excellent place to shop for those on a budget.

Overall, Zudio is a great store to visit if you're looking for trendy clothing and accessories at affordable prices. With its excellent customer service, well-designed layout, and frequent updates to its collection, Zudio is a must-visit store in the shopping mall.

It can be quite disheartening when encountering staff who do not seem to care. Their actions, or lack thereof, can create a negative experience for everyone involved. Ultimately, this can lead to a decline in satisfaction.
